author: James Clear

dropped_sections.reason: Extended hospital narrative — kept the headline injury and the recovery thesis as bridge; cut detailed minute-by-minute hospital scenes.
Author's bio / business growth history (article frequency, subscriber counts, speaking) — supporting only, not framework.
Extended British Cycling marginal-gains examples beyond the first illustrative use (massage gels, hand-washing surgeon, pillow types, white truck interiors).
Positive/Negative compounding sub-lists (productivity, knowledge, relationships, stress, negative thoughts, outrage) — repeated illustrations of single compounding concept.
Cancer/bamboo/tectonic plates analogies and San Antonio Spurs locker-room quote — second through fourth examples of the latent-potential concept.
Detailed expansion of each of the four problems with goals — already named as a framework anchor, illustrative bloat.
Brian Clark fingernails story and democracy/dictatorship analogy — second and third illustrations of the identity concept.
Latin etymology of identity, repeated 'votes' examples, and the 'I'm not a writer' personal recap — recap and redundant illustration.
Extended Thorndike cat trial data and Cat 12 timing list — second example of trial-and-error learning.
Brain-as-prediction-machine elaboration, freedom-vs-restriction repetition, dark-room light-switch and other rapid habit-loop micro-examples (texting, biting nails, coffee, doughnut).
Problem-phase/solution-phase split and table of seven worked habit-loop examples — repeated illustration of the framework already anchored.
Repeated 'invisible cue' anecdotes (gift-card scissors clerk, preschool teacher, lifeguard) — second through fourth examples of automaticity.
Sample habits scorecard worksheet and detailed point-and-call examples — exercise scaffolding, not framework.
Extended habit stacking morning/evening sample stacks, two-column current-habits brainstorm worksheet — exercise scaffolding.
Lewin equation business examples, eye-level shelf placement, end-cap Coca-Cola statistic, sensory system biology (eagles, snakes, sharks) — second through fourth supporting illustrations.
Dutch electricity-meter study, Schiphol urinal fly sticker, apple bowl personal anecdote, list of obvious-cue redesign tips — repeated illustrations of environment design.
Insomnia-bed study, work-from-couch personal anecdote, NYC small-apartment activity zones — second through fourth examples of context-as-cue.
Patty Olwell horseback-smoking anecdote, autocatalytic spiral examples (TV, anxiety, smoking), cocaine 33-millisecond study — repeated illustrations of cue-induced wanting.
Long list of reduce-exposure tips (phone, social media, TV, electronics reviews, video games) — repeated practical examples.
Greylag goose volleyball egg, food-science orosensation/dynamic-contrast/bliss-point illustrations, list of modern supernormal stimuli (mannequins, porn, ads) — second through fourth examples.
Olds/Milner rat experiments, nose-poke mice study, dopamine spike diagram description, wanting-vs-liking nucleus-accumbens neuroanatomy — repeated mechanistic detail.
Ronan Byrne Netflix bike, ABC TGIT Shonda Rhimes campaign, Premack's Principle elaboration, multi-example temptation-bundling list — second through fourth examples.
Polgar sisters extended bio (Susan/Sofia/Judit chess records, bathroom anecdote) and Charles Darwin/Montaigne quotes — repeated supporting detail.
Mike Massimino MIT robotics class, friend's-IQ study, Nerd Fitness Star Wars community, Solomon Asch line-length experiments in detail, chimpanzee nut-cracking — second through fifth examples.
Istanbul dinner scene, Allen Carr reframing-list quoted in full, taco underlying-motive worked example, table of seven habit-as-modern-vice pairings — repeated illustrations.

Wheelchair-as-liberation anecdote, exercise/finance/meditation/pregame reframing list, Ed Latimore headphones story, pregame ritual personal anecdote, breathe-and-smile dog-petting routine — second through sixth examples.
Detailed motion-vs-action examples (article-outline, diet plan, personal trainer) and 'preparation as procrastination' elaboration — repeated illustrations.

Hebb's Law / Donald Hebb biographical note, musician cerebellum / mathematician parietal lobe / London taxi driver hippocampus studies, George H. Lewes quote, automaticity habit-line graph description — repeated supporting science.
Jared Diamond Guns Germs and Steel agriculture-axis explanation extended over multiple paragraphs — single long supporting illustration of Law of Least Effort.

Garden-hose analogy, Japanese lean-production Suroweicki quote, addition-by-subtraction examples (meal delivery, dating apps, ride-sharing, voice speakers, UK tax-form study) — second through sixth illustrations of friction reduction.

Oswald Nuckols 'reset the room' detailed routine, wife's greeting-card box anecdote, breakfast/drawing/exercise/diet priming lists, unplug-TV gradient examples, phone-in-other-room personal habit — second through seventh examples.
Twyla Tharp extended cab-ritual quote, 5:15 pm workout-clothes personal anecdote, decisive moments restaurant-menu illustration — repeated illustrations.

Two-Minute Rule worked examples (gateway habits ladder, running shoes story, journaling Greg McKeown, gym five-minute reader, Hemingway quote, habit-shaping phases for early riser/vegan/exercise) — second through seventh illustrations and exercise scaffolding.

Victor Hugo Hunchback story extended, individual-package overeating, casino ban list, athlete weigh-in wallet, Nir Eyal outlet timer, split-the-meal restaurant tactic — second through sixth examples of commitment device.

John Henry Patterson NCR cash-register history, full table of onetime actions (nutrition/sleep/productivity/happiness/health/finance), Alfred North Whitehead quote, Netflix autoplay binge-watching dark side, social-media password-reset assistant story — extended supporting illustrations.

Karachi Safeguard soap full study narrative, Wrigley chewing gum history, toothpaste mint-flavor story, Sensodyne personal anecdote, narcissistic-relative story — second through fifth examples of make-it-satisfying.
Homo sapiens neocortex evolution detail, time-inconsistency behavioral-econ section, Bastiat quote elaboration, instant gratification SAT/obesity research — extended supporting science.
Habits-of-avoidance savings-account leather-jacket example, Trip-to-Europe couple anecdote, identity-aligned-reward bubble-bath/massage list — repeated illustrations.

Benjamin Franklin booklet, Jerry Seinfeld 'never break the chain' documentary, food-log weight-loss study, paperclip-distortion-of-self-view elaboration, habit-tracking three-benefits expanded analysis — second through fifth examples.
50%-gain-vs-33%-loss math illustration, Charlie Munger 'compounding' quote, bad-workouts identity reaffirmation — repeated reinforcement of never-miss-twice.
Restaurant-revenue measurement parable, work-long-hours / standardized-tests / 10,000-steps Goodhart examples, non-scale victory weight-loss tips — repeated illustrations.
Plumber/restaurant/surgeon punishment examples, late-fee customers, attendance-grade students, recycling-fine examples — second through fourth illustrations of immediate cost.

Bryan Harris detailed habit-contract weight-loss story, seat-belt-law statistics history, Margaret Cho song-a-day, Thomas Frank tweet-at-6am automation, comb-hair/brush-teeth self-presentation elaboration — second through fifth examples.

Extended Big Five biology (newborn extroversion noise study, oxytocin/agreeableness, neuroticism/amygdala), Robert Plomin quote, conscientiousness/environment-design call-back — supporting science detail.

Explore/exploit dating/college/business analogies, Google 80/20 AdWords/Gmail, five self-questions (fun-to-me-work-to-others, flow, returns, comes-naturally), Scott Adams Dilbert combination quote, biomechanics own-major personal anecdote, potato-vs-egg metaphor — second through seventh illustrations.

Steve Martin career timeline detail (Disneyland, magic shop, 60-cities tours), Federer/Williams tennis-mismatch example, Yerkes-Dodson law footnote, 4-percent-beyond-current-ability flow-state quantification — extended supporting detail.

Machiavelli novelty quote, video-games/porn/junk-food variable-reward examples, slot-machine dopamine spike, 50/50 success/failure sweet spot, Google/Uber/floss counter-examples, David Cain 'fair-weather meditator', personal sets/articles/relaxing list — second through seventh illustrations.

Chess fluency / brushing-teeth / morning-tea examples, basketball-dribble/surgeon-incision-mastery analogies, mastering-one-habit-then-the-next figure description — repeated illustrations of habits+practice.

Pat Riley CBE Magic-Johnson scoring formula worked out, Jackie MacMullan reporter quote, Riley's November-1985-vs-November-1986 comparison, Eliud Kipchoge notes, Katie Ledecky log, Chris Rock notepad, executives' decision journal, Integrity Report three questions extended — second through seventh examples.

Schoolteacher/manager/surgeon/band brittle-identity vignettes, vegan health-crisis example, military veteran / former entrepreneur identity-loss list, Tao Te Ching 'soft and supple' poem block — second through sixth illustrations.
